name: TestWaitForByteInput
title: TestWaitForByteInput
syntax: TestWaitForByteInput(char text[], char caption[], char info[]);
description: This function opens a dialog for byte array input. Optionally you can set some timeout in ms. Afterwards the dialog will be closed. You can optionally define some default input for the dialog.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: Text to be displayed in the entry dialog.
